3065860.name: Coconut
3065860.description:
Welcome to Coconut! 🌴✨ Dive into the ultimate coconut-clicking frenzy where the fun never stops. Ready to get your click on?

Key Features:
Click, Click, Click: It's simple. Click coconuts. Get points. Repeat. The more you click, the more coconuts you conquer! 🍍💪

Epic Skin Drops: Why settle for basic coconuts when you can have EPIC coconuts? Collect wild and wacky skins every 2 hours, and if you’re really lucky, score those ultra-rare skins every 14 hours. 🕶️🍒 (These skins as of now will only be available in your Steam Inventory, not in-game)


Thematic Madness: Switch up your coconut game with insane themes. From tropical vibes to spooky nights, your coconuts will never look the same again. 🌞🎃

Fresh Content: We’re always cooking up something new. Stay tuned for frequent updates packed with more skins, themes, and coconut chaos. 🚀🍪
